hero.title: Book trusted household help in minutes
hero.subtitle: ServEaso delivers instant, regular and short term access to safe, affordable, and trained maids, cooks, and caregivers.

services.title: Popular Services
services.subtitle: Choose from our trusted professional services
services.cookDesc: Skilled and hygienic cooks who specialize in home-style meals with authentic flavors.
services.maidDesc: Reliable maids for daily, deep, or special occasion cleaning with attention to detail.
services.nannyDesc: Trained support for children, seniors, or patients at home with compassionate care.

step1.title: Choose Your Service
step1.desc: Browse through our curated selection of professional household services tailored to your needs.

step2.title: Book in Seconds
step2.desc: Schedule your service with our intuitive platform. Pick date, time, and preferences effortlessly.

step3.title: Premium Service
step3.desc: Sit back and relax while our verified experts deliver exceptional quality and care.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Your trusted partner for household services
about.missionDesc: To provide safe, reliable, and affordable household services that make life easier for families.
about.visionDesc: To become India's most trusted platform for household services, creating thousands of jobs and serving millions of families.
about.storyDesc: ServEaso was founded in 2020 with a simple idea: make it easy for families to find trusted help at home. What started as a small initiative has grown into a platform connecting thousands of verified service providers with families across India.
about.teamDesc: We're a passionate team of technologists, service professionals, and customer support experts dedicated to revolutionizing household services.
about.joinDesc: Looking to make a difference? Explore career opportunities at ServEaso.

acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using the ServEaso platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.

definitions.title: 2. Definitions
definitions.content: 'Platform' refers to the ServEaso website and mobile application. 'Services' refer to the household services offered through our platform. 'Provider' refers to service professionals. 'Customer' refers to users seeking services.

eligibility.title: 3. Eligibility
eligibility.content: You must be at least 18 years old to use our services. By using our platform, you represent that you have the legal capacity to enter into binding contracts.

accounts.title: 4. User Accounts
accounts.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account.

bookings.title: 5. Bookings and Payments
bookings.content: All bookings are subject to availability. Payments are processed securely through our payment partners. Prices are subject to change without notice.

cancellation.title: 6. Cancellation and Refunds
cancellation.content: Cancellations made at least 24 hours before the scheduled service are eligible for a full refund. Late cancellations may incur charges.

conduct.title: 7. User Conduct
conduct.content: You agree to treat providers with respect and dignity. Harassment, discrimination, or inappropriate behavior will result in account termination.

liability.title: 8. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: ServEaso acts as an intermediary platform. We are not liable for any damages arising from services provided by third-party providers.

changes.title: 9. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use of the platform constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.

contact.title: 10. Contact Information
contact.content: For questions about these Terms, please contact us at support@serveaso.com.

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: ServEaso ('we', 'our', 'us') is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your personal information.

collection.title: 2. Information We Collect
collection.content: We collect information you provide directly, such as name, email, phone number, and address. We also automatically collect usage data and device information.

usage.title: 3. How We Use Your Information
usage.content: We use your information to provide and improve our services, process payments, communicate with you, and ensure platform security.

sharing.title: 4. Information Sharing
sharing.content: We share information with service providers to fulfill bookings, with payment processors for transactions, and as required by law.

security.title: 5. Data Security
security.content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your information. However, no method of transmission is 100% secure.

rights.title: 6. Your Rights
rights.content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You can also opt out of marketing communications.

cookies.title: 7. Cookies and Tracking
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience and analyze platform usage. You can control cookies through your browser settings.

children.title: 8. Children's Privacy
children.content: Our services are not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect information from children.

changes.title: 9. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this policy periodically. We will notify you of significant changes through the platform or via email.

contact.title: 10. Contact Us
contact.content: For privacy-related inquiries, please contact us at privacy@serveaso.com.
